message:
style: clippy cleanup sweep across core/db/search/server/test-helpers/tools/benches

Mechanical clippy cleanups batched into one commit because each
individual change is small, the lint rules involved are
well-established, and grouping them keeps the review diff small
and the blast radius explicit.

Lints addressed (representative, not exhaustive):
- `unnecessary_lazy_evaluations`:
    `.unwrap_or_else(|| x)` where `x` is cheap → `.unwrap_or(x)`
    (test-helpers/parity, cli/doctor_orphan_refs earlier).
- `unnecessary_wraps` / `map_unwrap_or`:
    `.map(|v| …).unwrap_or(default)` → `.map_or(default, |v| …)`
    (guard/retry path, core/git_binary::expand, core/config::
    env_truthy, core/ephemeral::ephemeral_project_roots_allowed).
- `is_some_and` / `option::is_some_and`:
    `process_env_value(key).map(|v| parse_bool(&v, false))
      .unwrap_or(false)` → `…is_some_and(|v| parse_bool(&v, false))`.
- `manual_range_contains`:
    `raw < MIN || raw > MAX` → `!(MIN..=MAX).contains(&raw)`
    (core/config interval clamps).
- `redundant_closure`:
    `take_while(|c| c.is_ascii_alphanumeric())` →
    `take_while(char::is_ascii_alphanumeric)`
    (core/ephemeral `looks_like_mkdtemp_segment` +
     `looks_like_go_test_segment`).
- `needless_lifetimes`:
    `fn metric<'a>(s: &'a X, …) -> &'a Y` → elided lifetime
    (core/agent_health test helper).
- `field_reassign_with_default`:
    `let mut config = Config::default(); config.foo = …; …` →
    `let config = Config { foo: …, ..Config::default() };`
    (core/flags test module).
- `unnecessary_panic_in_test`:
    `if …is_err() { panic!("…"); }` → `assert!(…is_ok(), "…")`
    (test-helpers/parity assert_parity_fails_loudly_on_mismatch).
- `missing_const_for_fn`:
    `fn as_tuple(self) -> …` → `const fn as_tuple(self)`
    (core/git_binary::GitVersion).
- `missing_must_use_on_fns`:
    builder-style `fn commit_initial`, `fn add_file_and_commit` on
    test-helpers/RepoBuilder now `#[must_use]`.
- `borrowed_box`:
    `arg: &Box<T>` → `arg: &T` (core/identity, several call sites
    where the Box indirection was accidental).
- `assertions_on_constants` → `const { assert!(…) }`
    (test-helpers already had this earlier, extended here).
- `struct_field_names` allow added where field names collide with
  the struct name deliberately (atc_queries test fixture
  ExpectedCounts { total_count, resolved_count, … }).
- `manual_assert`:
    `if … { panic!(…) }` → `assert!(…, message)`
    (core/config `guard_against_default_storage_root_in_test_mode`
     strict-mode branch).
- `redundant_pattern_matching`:
    `.map(|p| …)` chained after `Result` checks in atc_queries
    → `.inspect(|_p| …)`.
- `unused_self` / `needless_pass_by_value` for internal helpers.

Doc comment nits flagged by clippy's docs category:
- `STORAGE_ROOT` → `STORAGE_ROOT` (backticks) in config.rs.
- `CommitCoalescer` → `CommitCoalescer` (backticks) in git_cmd.rs.
- `TempDir`, `PathBuf` backticked in test-helpers/repo.rs.
- Multi-paragraph docs where clippy wanted
  `/// first para`<blank>`/// second para` instead of a single
  long paragraph (ephemeral, flags, config).

Files touched and nature of change:
- core/agent_health.rs — lifetime elision on metric helper
- core/config.rs — doc backticks + manual_assert + is_some_and +
  range_contains; symlink-resolver docs tightened
- core/ephemeral.rs — closure→fn ptr + doc reflow
- core/flags.rs — Config struct-literal pattern in 3 tests
- core/git_binary.rs — const fn + #[must_use] + map_or
- core/git_cmd.rs — one doc backtick
- core/git_lock.rs — small clippy tidy (unused imports / …)
- core/identity.rs — &Box<…> → &…
- db/atc_queries.rs — #[allow(clippy::struct_field_names)] +
  .inspect instead of .map-for-side-effects
- db/tests/atc_leader_lease.rs + atc_rollup_snapshot.rs — helper
  signatures tidied
- db/benches/inbox_bench.rs — follow-up tidy after the new bench
  landed: consistent `black_box` + `for_agent` rotation
- search-core/rollout.rs — minor is_some_and / map_or
- server/backup_rotation.rs + maintenance.rs — minor cleanups
- test-helpers/parity.rs — assert!/assert_eq! conversions,
  #[must_use] removed from cli_half_available (it returns
  Result<(), String>; callers always handle both arms)
- test-helpers/repo.rs — doc backticks + #[must_use] on builder
- test-helpers/shim_git.rs — similar
- tools/resources.rs — small cleanups
- mcp-agent-mail/benches/benchmarks.rs — two additional
  `black_box` wrappers so LLVM stops eliding the benchmarked
  call under criterion's `--release` runs.

No behaviour changes. Sweep validated by a local
`cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
staying green.
